page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Massively parallel phylogenetic placement of genetic sequences
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Complete reimplementation of the evolutionary placement algorithm (EPA) that is substantially faster, offers a distributed memory parallelization, and integrates concepts from both, RAxML-EPA and PPLACER.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Complete reimplementation of the evolutionary placement algorithm (EPA) that is substantially faster, offers a distributed memory parallelization, and integrates concepts from both, RAxML-EPA and PPLACER.
